channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 10 jurors said Palisades Fire suspect isn’t guilty. Now he faces an October retrial
item.description: After a deadlocked jury prompted a mistrial, a new federal trial date is set in the arson case against the man accused of sparking one of the most destructive wildfires in California history.

item.title: Fear grips Haitian communities after Supreme Court ruling unwinds protection from deportation
Bible stories are approved as required reading in Texas public schools
